scripts.dev:single: cd "DE COURSE ELECTIVE/course_allocation_system" && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run app.py --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false
scripts.dev:dual: cd DE2/dual_course_allocation && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run app/streamlit_app.py --server.port 8502 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false
scripts.dev:chat:single: cd addons/dept_chatbot_app && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run streamlit_chat.py --server.port 8511 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false
scripts.dev:chat:dual: cd addons/dual_chatbot_app && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run streamlit_chat.py --server.port 8512 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n frontend,api,streamlit,dual,chatapi,chatsingle,chatdual -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue,white,gray "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --open" "cd backend && uvicorn backend_api:app --reload --port 8000" "cd \"DE COURSE ELECTIVE/course_allocation_system\" && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run app.py --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false" "cd DE2/dual_course_allocation && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run app/streamlit_app.py --server.port 8502 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false" "cd addons/lifeskill_chatbot_service && python main.py" "cd addons/dept_chatbot_app && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run streamlit_chat.py --server.port 8511 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false" "cd addons/dual_chatbot_app && set STREAMLIT_BROWSER_GATHER_USAGE_STATS=false && streamlit run streamlit_chat.py --server.port 8512 --server.headless=true --browser.gatherUsageStats=false"
